hero.desc: Experience the ultimate "Burn After Reading" privacy. Our 100% P2P WebRTC architecture connects browsers directly, completely bypassing traditional media servers.

architecture.desc: We threw away the expensive streaming farms and rebuilt video conferencing purely for the browser's edge capabilities.

card1.title: 100% P2P Mesh Network
card1.desc: The server is just a matchmaker. Once connected, all audio and video streams flow directly between browsers. Unplug the server, and the meeting continues flawlessly.

card2.title: Burn After Reading
card2.desc: Media streams are generated, encrypted, and destroyed entirely within client memory. Physical-level data sovereignty.

card3.title: Canvas Recording
card3.desc: We use native HTML5 Canvas & AudioContext to composite multi-track layouts locally. Zero cloud recording costs.

card4.title: Watchdog Fallback
card4.desc: Mobile browser crashed on hardware decoding? Our Canvas Watchdog detects frame freezes >3.5s and instantly takes over rendering to prevent blue screens.

showcase1.desc: Abandon the utilitarian look of legacy open-source tools. Nebula introduces a luxurious dark mode, heavy backdrop blurs, and cinematic Framer Motion transitions.
showcase1.point1Desc: UI engine auto-calculates the optimal video layout based on device aspect ratio and participant count.
showcase1.point2Desc: Impress clients during pitches with a sci-fi holographic aesthetic that elevates your corporate image.

showcase2.desc: When you share your screen, the system automatically engages Focus Mode. We intelligently detect and block the dreaded "infinite mirror" effect that causes browser memory leaks and GPU crashes.

deployment.desc: Whether you have 10 or 10,000 employees, a basic $5/mo cloud server (or a Raspberry Pi) is all you need to host the signaling engine for your entire company.
